test-case.description: matches * at any depth (CODEOWNERS * means all files everywhere)
test-case.name: ConvertTo-CodeownersRegex.matches * at any depth (CODEOWNERS * means all files everywhere)

test-case.description: matches *.js at any depth (no leading /)
test-case.name: ConvertTo-CodeownersRegex.matches *.js at any depth (no leading /)

test-case.description: anchors a leading / to the root
test-case.name: ConvertTo-CodeownersRegex.anchors a leading / to the root

test-case.description: anchors patterns with an interior slash to the repo root
test-case.name: ConvertTo-CodeownersRegex.anchors patterns with an interior slash to the repo root

test-case.description: matches **/*.cs in subdirectories
test-case.name: ConvertTo-CodeownersRegex.matches **/*.cs in subdirectories

test-case.description: matches an anchored file pattern
test-case.name: ConvertTo-CodeownersRegex.matches an anchored file pattern

test-case.description: handles ? as single non-separator character
test-case.name: ConvertTo-CodeownersRegex.handles ? as single non-separator character

test-case.description: skips blank lines and comment lines
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-CodeownersText.skips blank lines and comment lines

test-case.description: parses a simple rule with one owner
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-CodeownersText.parses a simple rule with one owner

test-case.description: parses a rule with multiple owners including a team handle
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-CodeownersText.parses a rule with multiple owners including a team handle

test-case.description: records unown entries with empty rawOwners (no @ handles)
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-CodeownersText.records unown entries with empty rawOwners (no @ handles)

test-case.description: ignores tokens without @ prefix (emails etc.)
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-CodeownersText.ignores tokens without @ prefix (emails etc.)

test-case.description: returns multiple rules in order
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-CodeownersText.returns multiple rules in order

test-case.description: handles malformed patterns without throwing
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-CodeownersText.handles malformed patterns without throwing

test-case.description: returns empty array when rules list is empty
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.returns empty array when rules list is empty

test-case.description: returns empty array when file list is empty
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.returns empty array when file list is empty

test-case.description: applies last-match-wins: /docs/ overrides catch-all *
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.applies last-match-wins: /docs/ overrides catch-all *

test-case.description: unown entry means no owners for that file path
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.unown entry means no owners for that file path

test-case.description: uses catch-all for a file not covered by specific rules
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.uses catch-all for a file not covered by specific rules

test-case.description: unions owners from multiple files preserving insertion order
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.unions owners from multiple files preserving insertion order

test-case.description: deduplicates owners that appear for multiple files
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.deduplicates owners that appear for multiple files

test-case.description: expands team handles via expandOwnerFn
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.expands team handles via expandOwnerFn

test-case.description: excludes null/empty logins from expandOwnerFn
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.excludes null/empty logins from expandOwnerFn

test-case.description: works without expandOwnerFn (uses rawOwner as login)
test-case.name: Get-CodeownersForFiles.works without expandOwnerFn (uses rawOwner as login)
